project_name: The Central Nexus: The Tower of Ascension
current_chunk_title: Canon Repair: Portal Worlds and the True Floor 1
canon_priorities: The Central Nexus is the MMO-style hub/social city/faction marketplace.
Portal worlds are the main early campaign focus.
Each portal world creates or activates its own D&D 5e character.
Portal-world characters can return to the Central Nexus.
Portal-world characters can eventually attempt the Spire/Tower.
Items and followers from one portal world cannot be used in another portal world.
Followers are earned through quest lines and match the level of the player character from that portal world.
The true Spire Floor 1 is The Executioner.
The Executioner is a CR 10 extreme threat and should not be nerfed into a low-level tutorial.
Low-level Tower attempts should be dangerous and may result in death, extraction, or retreat.
The early campaign should point players toward portal worlds for leveling, followers, gear, and preparation.
